value: I'm sorry to hear you're frustrated about your Thanksgiving badge—I understand how disappointing that must be. To help you locate it or look into what happened, could you tell me a bit more about where you last saw the badge (in an app, email, or account dashboard) and whether you've checked your account settings or notifications recently? Once I understand the situation better, I'll do my best to help you recover it or explore what options we have available.
